title: Bacon Plus
description: A modpack for 1.19.4 that keeps the vanilla strategy but adds a lot more bosses, armour and gear. Aswell as a few other dimensions and planets to visit.
body:
This Minecraft modpack for version 1.19.4 combines the classic vanilla gameplay experience with an exhilarating array of new challenges, gear, and dimensions. Prepare for endless battles, powerful bosses, and awsome structures

In this modpack, the vanilla strategy of defeating bosses and progressing your armor and gear is enhanced and expanded. You'll encounter a multitude of bosses, each with their unique abilities and mechanics, challenging you to use your combat skills and develop new strategies. Defeating these bosses will reward you with rare loot and materials necessary for crafting powerful equipment.

Explore additional dimensions and planets beyond the confines of your Minecraft world. The Bumblezone mod takes you into a buzzing realm filled with honey and unique resources, while the Ad Astra Space mod propels you into the vastness of space, allowing you to traverse many and collect loot along the way. These additional dimensions and planets offer exciting new challenges, resources, and adventures for you to uncover.

Essential mod is Included (Play with friends)
